coordination_equation.route_term: G_route = mean(1 - R_route_mega, K_route, H_mega_v15, 1 - R_fail)
coordination_equation.system_term: M_coord = G_struct + G_ctx + G_route + G_growth + R_coord - P_coord

project_readout.summary: 更大系统协同稳定化开始专门处理结构、上下文和路由三条线一起变脆的问题，使主线第一次从单项补强转向协同护栏。
